title: SPOTKANIA GRUP DYSKUSYJNYCH W CELU LEPSZEGO WSPARCIA PRODUCENTÓW DROBIU W ZAKRESIE BEZPIECZEŃSTWA BIOLOGICZNEGO
description: A guide describing the use of facilitated discussion groups as a tool to help poultry producers implement and sustain biosecurity measures on farms. It outlines the structure, roles, meeting techniques, and benefits for participants and moderators within a three-step change process.
